# remnawave_billing_history (Resource)

Manages a Remnawave infra billing history record. Records cannot be updated — only created and deleted.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `amount` (Number) Billing amount.
- `billed_at` (String) Billing date (ISO 8601 datetime).
- `provider_uuid` (String) UUID of the infra provider.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String)
